name: Hunt.io — C2 & malicious-infrastructure CTI
description: Enriches your CTI from the Hunt.io API (api.hunt.io) — internet-wide scanning for malicious infrastructure: command-and-control (C2) servers, malware, SSL certificates, JARM/JA4 hashes and open directories. Two modes: pass `ip` to enrich a single IP (GET /v1/enrich/ip/{ip}), or run with no `ip` to pull the active-C2 feed (GET /v1/c2s). Each result becomes a XTHREAT.INTELEXCHANGE record (via runner.import_threat_intel, idempotent), with the malware family, AS/country, certificate and JARM/JA4 fingerprints and the C2 ATT&CK technique (T1071). API key via env HUNTIO_API_KEY (header token: ak_...). Offline: pass `file` = a Hunt.io JSON response, or run with the bundled sample.

parameters.name: ip
parameters.help: An IP address to enrich (GET /v1/enrich/ip/{ip}). Omit to pull the active-C2 feed.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.help: Max C2 records to import from the feed

parameters.name: file
parameters.help: A Hunt.io JSON response to parse offline (instead of calling the API)
